Mesmerization  

Description

1: Mesmerize (2/55)
2: Memblur (1%)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 70 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any AE Range: 30
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Dot Stacking: Yes Reflectable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: Targeted AE Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You are mesmerized.
Cast on other: Soandso has been mesmerized.
Effect Fades: You are no longer mesmerized.

Game Description

Cause up to %T enemies in a small area around your target to fall into an enchanted sleep for up to 24 secs (4 ticks). This spell works on creatures up to level @1.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Mesmerization [ID 15307]
  • Spell: Mesmerization [crafted]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Mesmerization
Spell: Mesmerization
ClassLevel
ENC16
Expansion:

Duration:
4 ticks

  • Scroll 2 Sold By (1)
  • Scroll 2 Crafted (1)

  • Kindra Farseer
  • Rephas
Add Image

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Illusionist Jerup - 7gp 7sp

Edited, Tue Oct 11 23:13:51 2005
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT ARE THE REQUIRED ITEMS?
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2005 at 7:48 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1611533845024
Scholar
147 posts
Tasarin's Grimore Pg26 Left and Pg26 Right. Trivial is 21, but if your skill is in that range expect to get failed combines. It has been a very long time since I hunted for these pages, but I recall finding one side in Highpass from gnolls or orcs (I don't recall exactly) and the other page I believe in Field of Bone or Kurn's Tower (once again, 4 years ago IS a long time to remember). The drop info I have access to says "Zones to numerous to list", but there you have my best guess.

Edited, Wed Aug 3 08:48:16 2005
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT ARE THE REQUIRED ITEMS?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2005 at 12:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592337718858
7 posts
I found several copies of both of these while farming wolf, cat, and bear pelts in North Karana. Also pretty sure I had them drop in Unrest back in the day.
▲ Page top
RE: WHAT ARE THE REQUIRED ITEMS?
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2005 at 3:16 AM Rating: Decent
Ssassyyy
13 posts
If you go to casters realm and look at the old spell lists http://eq.crgaming.com/menu/spells_old.asp it lists the research components there.
▲ Page top
RE: Where do i find this?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2004 at 6:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799737456
2 posts
I have found a lot of pg.223 (levitate) pg.24 (Disempower)and most importantly pg.26 (Mez) in Kurns tower, they drop off of the Skellies there and the Burnyl mobs in the basment mostly. I have stacks of both sides of the pages saved up for my chanter when he gets to 16. Its a great place to lvl up younger toons as well as collect these pages. Hope this helps, 650 plat is way to much for this poor EQ player to pay :)
▲ Page top
LDoN Misadventure
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2004 at 4:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363196178
2 posts
I was able to find the pages on vendors fairly easily and eventually I made about 4 copies. The left page is considerably rarer than the right one, imho. I am on Venril Sathir server and I still have one copy.
However, I discovered one big problem with this spell while adventuring in LDoN. We had a pull of about 5 creatures who were beating up on our tank and instead of cycling through each one to mez them singly since I felt it would take too long and the tank was going down quickly, I cast mesmerization with the area mez. Unbeknownst to me, there was a chest/trap/box I couldn't see nearby and the area mez set off the trap which poisoned everyone in our group and we all eventually died. Furthermore, the trap exploding negated the area mez so the Mob's kept hitting on us. So, if possible in LDoN - at least - consider trying to cycle through the Mobs and avoid area mez unless you are in dire straits or you know with reasonable certainty that no trap/chest/box is present nearby.

Lowee, enchanter of 46th circle
▲ Page top
Best Farm Location
QuoteReply
# May 24 2004 at 6:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592761033145
Scholar
44 posts
Spell parts for this spell drop regularly on Gorge Hounds in East Karanas. Farm there or check the npc merchants in the farmhouse in EK.

▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 6:31 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248944365
Scholar
139 posts
I don't play an enchanter much at all.. created mine a couple of years ago, and have left him collecting dust... anyway, this morning I woke up early and had some time before work, so I figure, alright, I'll log on my chanter...

I load him up and realize he doesn't have all his level 16 spells, so I run to the bazaar.

This spell alone was 650pp, and I see someone else said they see it for 2k. All I gotta say is WOW. That's pretty expensive for a level 16 spell no? So tell me, is this spell still useful up to the 50s?
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2003 at 11:22 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
The spell is useful to 55, when you get the upgraded aoe mez.

However, the people pricing it for 650pp, are being ridiculous. The research components for this spell are not uncommon. I found them on a merchant in PoK, and had a higher level chanter in my guild combine, since my chanter has pretty low research skill.

Total cost, about 3pp or so.

eqtraders.com has the recipe for this spell.
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2003 at 12:52 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248944365
Scholar
139 posts
That's what I thought too.. then when looking for the pages in the bazaar, even the pages for this spell were being sold for 200-300pp. I can't see it as being that uncommon... I did however, just cave, and bought the spell for 650pp as I didn't want to risk a failed combine. I do have high research skill, but I didn't want to take the risk.
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2003 at 1:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Don't try to buy the pages in Bazaar, merchant dive for them. I found all mine in about 10 minutes on merchants in PoK.
▲ Page top
is this enthrall?
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 9:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760364464
13 posts
How does this spell differ from the lvl 16 spell enthrall which can be bought at vendors?
▲ Page top
RE: is this enthrall?
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2003 at 5:35 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592760394269
8 posts
No this spell is an AE spell it effects multiple targets at one time... Warning if you cast it too close it will mez you too and it only lasts 4 ticks... so practice in a newbie zone first... Great Spell!
▲ Page top
Research
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 11:29 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594570761161
Guru
142 posts
Find Tasarins Grimoire Page 26 Left and Right to research this spell. Best spots to look for the words are:
1. Highhold pass/keep.
2. Lake of Ill Omen
3. Fironia Vie
4. Shadowhaven
5. If all else fails - Bazaar.
▲ Page top
RE: Research
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2003 at 2:36 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1606090737819
Sage
159 posts
These should also drop off mobs in Kurn's Tower and the swamp of no hope that are between level 15 and 19.

On Stormhammer, this spells sells for 2k pp so it is worth researching!!

Edited, Thu Mar 20 14:04:28 2003
